data.label: True
data.explanation: The Bagong Pilipinas Merit Scholarship Program (BPMSP) is indeed accepting online applications for the academic year 2026-2027. This scholarship is aimed at Grade 12 students who are planning to attend college but are concerned about financial constraints. CHED and SunStar confirm the scholarship's availability and application period.
